{{Quote|They got Lishma. He wasn't even shooting…|Mazzic|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Lishma''' was a [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked for [[Mazzic]]. He accompanied the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Myke]] to the [[Whistler's Whirlpool Tapcafe]] on [[Trogan/Legends|Trogan]] for what became the first meeting of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]]. When [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Reynol Kosk]] and his men [[Ambush on Trogan|attacked]], Lishma was killed in the firefight.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars: The Last Command (comic series)|comic adaptation]] of ''[[The Last Command]]'', Lishma was incorrectly represented with three horns instead of two like other [[Gotal/Legends|Gotals]].
